name: Henesys
description: A peaceful mushroom-themed village and the starting town for Bowmen. Known for its lush green fields and friendly atmosphere.
connected_worlds: Ellinia, Kerning City, Perion, Sleepywood, Six Path Crossway

name: Ellinia
description: A magical forest village built high in the treetops, home to the Magician job instructor. The ancient trees hold powerful magic.

name: Perion
description: A rugged mountain village and the training ground for Warriors. Built on arid cliffs with ancient stone structures.

name: Kerning City
description: An urban underground city where Thieves train in the shadows. Its dark alleys and subway systems hide many secrets.

name: Sleepywood
description: A dark and mysterious village hidden deep within the forests of Victoria Island. The Dungeon beneath holds dangerous creatures and ancient secrets.

name: Victoria Island
description: The central continent of Maple World where most adventurers begin their journey. Home to the four original job towns and Sleepywood.

name: Orbis
description: A beautiful cloud city floating high above the ground, serving as the major transportation hub of Ossyria. Connected to many regions via airships.
connected_worlds: El Nath, Aqua Road, Ludibrium, Ellinia, Ereve

name: El Nath
description: A frozen mountain town at the peak of the tallest mountain in Ossyria. Home to the Chief Knights and the path to the Dead Mine.

name: Aqua Road
description: An underwater kingdom deep beneath Orbis, filled with aquatic creatures and ancient ruins. The water pressure increases as you descend deeper.

name: Ludibrium
description: A massive toy-themed tower kingdom made of colorful blocks and clockwork machinery. Time flows strangely in this whimsical realm of toys come to life.
connected_worlds: Orbis, Korean Folk Town, Omega Sector

name: Leafre
description: An ancient dragon-inhabited region with lush primordial forests. Home to the legendary Dragon Rider and the gateway to the Temple of Time.

name: Temple of Time
description: A sacred temple where the flow of time is controlled, guarded by the Goddess of Time. Here adventurers witness the past, present, and future of Maple World.

name: Ereve
description: The floating island stronghold of Empress Cygnus and her Cygnus Knights. Protected by the divine beast Shinsoo, it serves as the command center against the Black Mage.

name: Edelstein
description: An industrial mining city under the occupation of the Black Wings. The Resistance operates in secret from its underground base to liberate the city.

name: Magatia
description: A desert town divided between two rival alchemist factions, the Zenumists and Alcadno. Ancient alchemical secrets lie buried beneath its sandy streets.

name: Vanishing Journey
description: The gateway to the Arcane River where memories and existence slowly fade away. A haunting land where forgotten things come to disappear entirely.

name: Chu Chu Island
description: A whimsical island made of toys, candy, and childhood dreams within the Arcane River. Its cheerful appearance masks the nightmarish hunger of Muto.

name: Lachelein
description: The City of Nightmares, an eternal ballroom where trapped souls dance under Lucid's control. Its gothic beauty hides the terror of never-ending dreams.

name: Arcana
description: A primordial spirit realm where nature spirits maintain the balance between life and death. The corruption of darkness threatens this ancient equilibrium.

name: Morass
description: The Swamp of Memory where time flows in distorted loops, replaying fragments of Maple World's history. Past events manifest as tangible threats.

name: Esfera
description: The final region of the Arcane River at the edge of existence, where the boundary between worlds is thinnest. The path to the Black Mage's domain opens here.

name: Moonbridge
description: A bridge of solidified moonlight spanning the void between the Arcane River and the Black Mage's domain. The Maple Alliance crosses this treacherous path under constant attack.

name: Labyrinth of Suffering
description: A twisted maze within Tenebris where adventurers face their deepest fears and regrets given physical form. Verus Hilla guards this nightmarish labyrinth.

name: Limina
description: The end of all worlds, where reality unravels at the Black Mage's throne. This is the final battlefield where the fate of all existence is determined.

name: Pantheon
description: The ancient capital of the Nova race in Grandis, featuring grand architecture and powerful guardians. It serves as the base of operations for the Nova resistance against Magnus.

name: Heliseum
description: A war-torn city in Grandis occupied by Magnus and his forces. The Nova fight to reclaim their homeland in fierce urban combat.

name: Savage Terminal
description: A lawless frontier outpost on the edge of Grandis civilization. Pirates, mercenaries, and outlaws gather here at the crossroads between worlds.

name: Cernium
description: The holy city where the sacred flame burns eternal, serving as the first major destination in the Grandis storyline. War between the High Flora and the Alliance rages through its streets.

name: Hotel Arcus
description: A dimensional hotel that exists between worlds, accessible from various points across Grandis. Its enigmatic owner Putan manages the crossroads of fate.

name: Odium
description: An ancient dwarven city buried underground, filled with advanced mechanical technology and mining operations. The ruins contain secrets about the Ancient Gods.

name: Shangri-La
description: A paradise-like realm inspired by Eastern mythology, hidden away from the conflicts of Grandis. Its tranquil beauty conceals ancient powers tied to the Transcendents.

name: Arteria
description: The heart of Grandis where the continent's life force flows, a region of immense energy. Deeper truths about the Transcendents and the fate of Grandis are revealed here.

name: Carcion
description: The latest frontier in the Grandis saga, a mysterious region where the conflict with Darmoor intensifies. New revelations about the nature of existence await.

name: Rien
description: A frozen island where Aran was sealed in ice for centuries. The Rien Clan has guarded the sleeping Hero throughout the ages.

name: Ariant
description: A desert kingdom ruled by a spoiled queen, surrounded by vast sandy dunes and scorching heat. Hidden treasures and ancient ruins lie beneath the sands.

name: Mu Lung
description: An Eastern-themed mountain village where martial arts masters train. The Mu Lung Dojo challenges adventurers to test their combat skills.

name: Herb Town
description: A peaceful fishing village near Mu Lung, known for its herbal medicines and tranquil waters. The Pirate job instructor resides here.

name: Omega Sector
description: A sci-fi military research base dealing with alien invasions from outer space. Advanced technology and extraterrestrial threats make this a unique area.

name: Korean Folk Town
description: A village inspired by traditional Korean culture, filled with folklore creatures and legends. Moon Bunnies and traditional architecture create a unique atmosphere.

name: Zipangu
description: A region inspired by Japanese culture, featuring shrines, hot springs, and yokai. Multiple towns including Mushroom Shrine and Showa Town offer unique adventures.

name: Kritias
description: An ancient kingdom frozen in time by a catastrophic magical event. As time slowly resumes, adventurers explore its crumbling ruins and battle time-displaced monsters.
